generation.style: Amadis-style tactical JRPG battle animation, elegant fantasy heroine sprite feel

prompts.master: full body heroine, A-pose, front view, transparent or plain background, same face, same dress or armor, same weapon, consistent proportions
prompts.idle: subtle breathing idle loop, fantasy heroine, same costume, transparent background
prompts.run: side-facing tactical run cycle, fantasy heroine, same costume, transparent background
prompts.hit: brief recoil hit reaction, fantasy heroine, same costume, transparent background
prompts.death: falling defeat sequence, fantasy heroine, same costume, transparent background
